description: Fixture deliberately bakes three secret-named ENV rows (API_KEY, DB_PASSWORD, STRIPE_SECRET) into image layers. The dkr-no-secrets-in-env rule fires once per matching ENV line, so three findings are expected. The image is otherwise hardened (pinned-digest FROM, non-root USER, no curl|sh, no remote ADD) to keep the fixture focused on the secret-in-env rule.
